project.name: Chart Search AI Module - llama-server Native Binaries
project.description: Pre-built llama-server binaries from llama.cpp for each supported platform. The binaries are extracted at runtime by LocalLlmEngine and managed as a subprocess for LLM inference. To add a new platform, build llama-server from https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp and place the binary under src/main/resources/llama-server/{OS}/{arch}/.
